# Native libpg_query Integration Expert Skill

This skill covers versioned native library loading, runtime asset layout, diagnostics, cross-platform
support, and packaging expectations for Npgquery and libpg_query integration.

## Use this skill when changing
- `src/libs/Npgquery/`
- native runtime asset packaging
- native library diagnostics
- multi-version parser support
- Linux/macOS/Windows native loading behavior
